name: Gifford Hall
description: Built in 1940, Gifford Hall is a sophomore residence hall that has 4- and 5-person suites in addition to singles that span accros 6 floors. Gifford is conveniently located near Proctor Dining Hall. The building also houses the Gamut Room, a student-run performance space situated in the basement, along with an outdoor amphitheater and a classroom.

name: Battell Hall
description: Battell Hall is the biggest first year dorm, and it is located in the center of campus. Battell is made up of mostly doubles, but there are also a few singles. Battell features bathtubs and many small lounge spaces.

name: Allen Hall
description: Allen is a small freshman dorm located about a 15 second walk from Atwater dining hall. Allen has a large lounge and a full kitchen. There is also a large parking lot next to Allen.

name: Stewart Hall
description: Stewart is a freshman dorm conveniently close to Proctor dining hall. It has doubles on single-gender floors and a large laundry room in the basement. There is a lounge with a kitchen in the basement and a lounge on the second floor

name: Hepburn Hall
description: Hepburn is a freshman dorm located a 30 second walk from Proctor Dining Hall. It is also conveniently close to the athletic center and right down Chapel Hill is Davis Library

name: Hadley Hall
description: Hadley is part of the Ross complex, so you can get to Ross dining hall without even going outside. It is also conveniently close to Bi hall. Each floor has 2 suites with 3 doubles and singles on the other side of the hall. There is laundry in the basement.

name: Coffrin Hall
description: Coffrin Hall is conveniently close to Atwater Dining Hall and Bicentennial Hall. Coffrin houses and sophomores with both singles and doubles. Coffrin also has a large communal kitchen and a large lounge area. There is also a large parking lot next to Coffrin

name: Pearsons Hall
description: Pearsons is a sophomore dorm building next to Ross dining hall and only about a 3 minute walk from Proctor dining hall. There are doubles and singles in Pearsons. There is also a lounge

name: Millikin Hall
description: Millikin is sophomore housing and is part of the Ross building. It has suites with 3 doubles and it has individual singles across the hall from suites.
